description.p: FloatBoard is a productivity-focused, floating clipboard manager that allows you to easily store, organize, and paste your clipboard history directly from a clean, unobtrusive floating overlay. Designed for speed and efficiency.
Features include a smart native screenshot integration (Ctrl+Shift+S) that hooks into your desktop environment's native screenshot tool via DBus Portals, seamlessly adding captures to your board.
Added smart native screenshot integration (Ctrl+Shift+S) using DBus Portals.
Completely optimized and built natively for Linux.
